dialog.title: New account
dialog.description: Link a bank to a friendly label your team will recognize.
dialog.bankHint: Only banks ready for automation appear here.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.nameHint: A label you'll see throughout the app.

banks.title: Banks
banks.subtitle: Manage banks and their automation scripts

accountConfig.title: Account configuration
accountConfig.webhookPayloadPassthroughDesc: For each detected bank movement, a POST will be sent to this URL with the following payload:
accountConfig.endpointFormatDesc: The endpoint must return a JSON array with the following schema:
accountConfig.webhookPayloadDesc: When an order is successfully reconciled, a POST will be sent to this URL with the following payload:
accountConfig.webhookExtraFieldsDesc: JSON object with extra fields that will be merged into the webhook payload (for example, a source or a fixed tag). You can't use these reserved keys: external_id, status, amount, currency, name, id, received_at.
accountConfig.webhookExtraFieldsReserved: These reserved keys can't be used: {{keys}}
accountConfig.silentIngestionDesc: Ingest movements without sending notifications. Use it when starting the system for the first time so existing movements from the day do not trigger webhooks. Turn it off when you want to receive notifications normally.
accountConfig.sessionTypeOneShotDesc: Opens the browser, reads, and closes for each scrape.
accountConfig.sessionTypePersistentDesc: Keeps the browser open monitoring incoming movements live.
accountConfig.loginModeSimpleDesc: Logs in automatically with stored credentials.
accountConfig.loginModeAssistedDesc: Waits for someone to enter the 2FA code in the browser.

blocked.title: Session blocked
blocked.description: A fatal failure (bad credentials) stopped automatic scraping for this account. Fix the credentials and restart to resume.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Deleting this account is irreversible and will remove all associated data.
danger.dialogIntro: This action cannot be undone. Deleting this account will permanently remove:
danger.typeToConfirm: To confirm, type the exact account name:
